results.rendered_html:
vācoyukti a. Skilled in speech, eloquent.
— ktiḥ f.
1 ‘Arrangement of words’, a declaration, announcement, speech; yatra khalviyaṃ vācoyuktiḥ  Māl. 1. 
2 Good or clever speech.
